response.justification: Exceptionally strong software engineer with 17+ years of full-stack experience, proven leadership, and impressive technical breadth across cloud, infrastructure, and distributed systems. However, the role explicitly requires demonstrated AI expertise with built products or platforms—the candidate's AI work began only recently (April 2025) with no prior track record. Lacks the advanced degree in AI/ML that the role prefers. Better suited for a senior full-stack or cloud architecture role than one requiring established AI specialization.
strengths: 17+ years of consistent software engineering with demonstrated technical leadership through multiple Staff roles, open-source founding, and community knowledge-sharing
Exceptional technical breadth across full-stack, cloud (AWS CDK, Kubernetes), infrastructure, testing, and multiple programming languages—strong builder fluency
Track record of innovation and platform thinking through GISCollective and testing framework projects, showing ability to architect systems beyond immediate implementation
concerns: AI expertise is very recent and undemonstrated: AI work began April 2025 (2 months ago) with no prior AI/ML product or platform track record
No advanced degree in AI, machine learning, or related field—only two Bachelor's degrees in Computer Science and Photography/Video/Image Processing
Background is primarily execution and builder-focused; strategy-level platform and product thinking not clearly demonstrated in earlier roles before recent AI work

key_factors.factor: Demonstrated AI expertise and track record
Years of experience and technical foundation
